serverNeeds.description: Per-page index/noindex status on the all-pages row payload for the N5 Noindex quick-filter chip.

serverNeeds.description: H1 + URL-slug write endpoints plus automatic redirect on slug change (N3/Q1). Gated on owner approval; recommend read-only v1.
serverNeeds.evidence: updatePageSeo (server/webflow-pages.ts:73) writes seo/openGraph/title only; grep for slug/H1 writes across server/routes/webflow*.ts empty; no redirect-write route exists (see sn-seo-editor-4).

serverNeeds.description: Per-page rank position + monthly organic traffic joined onto editor rows (N6), avoiding N-per-row API fan-out.
serverNeeds.evidence: Workspace-level GA4 top-pages exists (server/routes/google.ts:356 /api/google/analytics-top-pages) and rank lives in keyword strategy, but no per-page projection onto the all-pages payload.
serverNeeds.whereItLives: server/routes/webflow.ts all-pages assembly or a new editor-rows projection module

serverNeeds.description: Webflow redirect-create endpoint backing the N9 'Add redirect' CTA on manual rows (also prerequisite for sn-seo-editor-2's auto-redirect).
serverNeeds.evidence: Client wrappers redirects.list/save (src/api/misc.ts:250-256) target /api/webflow/redirects/:siteId, but grep 'webflow/redirects' across server/ returns nothing — orphaned wrappers, no server route; RedirectManager.tsx never calls them.
serverNeeds.whereItLives: server/routes/webflow-analysis.ts (alongside redirect-scan) or a new redirects route

serverNeeds.description: Server-persisted per-page drafts replacing localStorage drafts — CONTINGENT on Q6 choosing server-side tier.
serverNeeds.evidence: Drafts are localStorage-only (useSeoEditorPageWorkflow.ts:62); server persistence exists only for bulk suggestions (server/routes/webflow-seo-suggestions.ts:35,76,175), not per-page drafts.
serverNeeds.whereItLives: new seo_drafts table + endpoints near webflow-seo-suggestions.ts

serverNeeds.description: Serialize the persisted analysis optimizationScore onto all-pages rows so the N2 on-page score is analysis-backed, not a duplicate client heuristic.
serverNeeds.evidence: optimizationScore exists in persisted page analysis (keywords.persistAnalysis src/api/seo.ts:77; carried in src/types/fix-context.ts) but is not on the GET /api/webflow/all-pages/:siteId row payload (PageMeta lacks it, useSeoEditor.ts:13-24).

openQuestions.question: Q1: H1 + slug editing with auto-redirect (N3) — approve new Webflow write scope or render read-only in v1?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Read-only in v1 ('edit in Webflow'); sn-seo-editor-2 as a follow-up ticket.

openQuestions.question: Q2: Does the rebuilt editor's Research mode own Analyze/persist, Analyze-All, and 'analysis on file' (Page Intelligence merge, D3)?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Yes — D3 is locked; carry all three (APIs already exist) and coordinate route retirement with the page-intelligence audit.

openQuestions.question: Q3: Where do recommendations-engine flags/priority sort render — score fold-in, row flag, or Research drawer?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Row flag + rec-first sort preserved; score stays separate until analysis-backed.

openQuestions.question: Q4: Canonical state machine — HEAD 7-state (client sets approved/rejected) vs prototype 4-state with admin Approve (N4/N12).
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Keep HEAD 7-state; reject admin Approve; queue ships Send/Publish/Skip only.

openQuestions.question: Q5: Site-wide Publish Site button — keep on editor, globalize, or drop?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Keep on editor topbar (only path that flushes pending static changes site-wide).

openQuestions.question: Q6: Persistence tier for drafts + AI suggestions — localStorage carry-over vs server-side draft status; does the suggestions panel survive as-is?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Carry localStorage + server suggestions panel as-is (T1); server drafts (sn-seo-editor-5) as follow-up.

openQuestions.question: Q7: Where does the Sent-to-Client batch panel with Retract live in the new IA?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Keep as a collapsible editor panel in v1; global approvals view is a separate surface decision.

openQuestions.question: Q8: Approve the per-page index/noindex data addition (sn-seo-editor-1) or drop the Noindex chip?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Drop the chip in v1; add with sn-seo-editor-1 when audit-data join is scoped.

openQuestions.question: Q9: May the editor write target keywords (assign/track) given Keyword Hub single-writer ownership?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: No direct write in v1 — deep-link to Keyword Hub; endpoints exist (keyword-strategy.ts:782-812) if owner grants shared-writer later.

openQuestions.question: NEW: src/api/misc.ts redirects.list/save wrappers target a nonexistent server route and have no call sites — delete as dead code, or adopt as the sn-seo-editor-4 client contract?
openQuestions.proposedDefault: Adopt the wrapper shape when building sn-seo-editor-4; otherwise delete in the rebuild PR.

Approvals/Inbox surface: Q7 decides where the Retract batch panel lives; client approval flow drives E2 states

D7 approval-history map verified from doc evidence (CmsEditorCollections.tsx:436-444), not re-read

verdicts.evidence: src/hooks/admin/useSeoEditor.ts:13-23 PageMeta has only id/title/slug/publishedPath/seo/source/collectionId — no index field. server/routes/webflow.ts:152-178 builds the all-pages row literally from those fields plus CMS discovery; no index/noindex/robots read anywhere in the route (grep 'noindex|indexable|robots' over server/routes/webflow.ts + server/webflow-pages.ts returns nothing). No existing implementation missed.

server/webflow-pages.ts:73-97 updatePageSeo accepts a slug field in its signature but the ONLY route wiring it (server/routes/webflow.ts:209) passes just { seo, openGraph, title } — slug/H1 are never threaded through. No H1/slug write route exists: grep of router.(post|put) with h1 in server/routes/webflow*.ts finds only audit/coverage math. webflow-seo-page-tools.ts:100 'currentH1' is an INPUT to the AI /seo-copy generator (returns suggestions, no webflowMutation/PUT), not a write. No redirect-write route (see sn-seo-editor-4). Claim stands: read-only today.

existsToday=partial is correct — no per-page projection onto the all-pages payload (server/routes/webflow.ts:152-185 joins no rank/traffic). BUT the whereItLives detail is imprecise: per-page rank does NOT live in 'keyword strategy' JSON — it lives in the dedicated page_keywords table as current_position/previous_position columns (server/page-keywords.ts:36-37,161-162,221-222), read side-effect-free via listPageKeywordsPaged (page-keywords.ts:520-538) which also already carries per-page impressions/clicks/volume. So the projection source is page_keywords (a clean paged read), not keywordStrategy. GA4 monthly organic traffic remains workspace-level only (server/routes/google.ts:356 /api/google/analytics-top-pages). Effort M holds.

Core claim CONFIRMED: no server route for POST/GET /api/webflow/redirects/:siteId (grep 'webflow/redirects' over server/ returns nothing; no redirect create/write route by any name — grep router.(post|put).*redirect empty). Only redirect-scan (server/routes/webflow-analysis.ts:198, scan-only, writes a snapshot) and redirect-snapshot (:239, read) exist. The evidence's assertion that 'RedirectManager.tsx never calls them' is WRONG: RedirectManager.tsx:91,118 DOES call redirects.snapshot and redirects.scan; it is redirects.list/save (the orphaned /api/webflow/redirects wrappers) that have no server route — and save is actually called by src/components/audit/DeadLinkPanel.tsx:47 (a live orphaned call that would 404). So the wrappers are not fully unused; the DeadLinkPanel 'Add redirect' path is already broken against a missing endpoint.

existsToday=partial is correct — drafts are localStorage-only (src/components/editor/seoEditorPersistence.ts:26 returns window.localStorage; the cited useSeoEditorPageWorkflow.ts path is wrong — the hook lives at src/components/editor/useSeoEditorPageWorkflow.ts, not src/hooks/admin/). Server persistence exists only for bulk SEO suggestions (server/routes/webflow-seo-suggestions.ts list/apply/dismiss), NOT per-page drafts. No seo_drafts/seo_draft table exists (grep over server/db/migrations/ + server/ returns nothing). Correction is only the file-path citation; effort M and 'new table + endpoints' scope stand.

existsToday=partial correct — optimizationScore is NOT on the all-pages row payload (PageMeta lacks it, useSeoEditor.ts:13-23; route builds no score, webflow.ts:152-185). BUT the persisted source is not just 'keywordStrategy.pageMap JSON' as whereItLives states — it is a dedicated page_keywords.optimization_score column with a row mapper (server/page-keywords.ts:175 rowToModel, :234 upsert) and a clean paged read (listPageKeywordsPaged:520-538). The read is side-effect-free: the maybeRecordScoreSnapshot writer (page-keywords.ts:473) is only invoked from the WRITE/upsert helpers (lines 579,600,623,653), never from list/get reads — so it is safe for a hot editor-rows read (unlike the computeROI hazard). This makes effort S credible provided the projection reads page_keywords, not a re-parse of keywordStrategy JSON.
